description_long: This object is a ground-mounted solar energy installation featuring a large rectangular array of photovoltaic panels supported by a robust metal framework. The solar panels are elevated above a patterned base, which appears to simulate an urban environment with marked zones and geometric textures. The structure is supported by angled metal posts, providing stability and clearance beneath the panels. Several black utility boxes and equipment are distributed around the base, likely representing electrical components or control units. The installation includes a designated 'firescape' area, suggesting safety considerations in its design. The overall appearance is industrial and functional, suitable for deployment in public spaces, parking lots, or urban parks.
description: A ground-mounted solar panel array with a sturdy metal frame, elevated above a patterned urban base and surrounded by utility boxes and safety markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solar panel array elevated on angled supports, with the patterned base and steps visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full width of the solar array, the supporting posts, and several utility boxes along the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the solar panels, the firescape safety marking, and additional geometric features on the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the array's depth, more utility boxes, and the detailed surface pattern of the base.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 20 degrees, azimuth direction not clearly specified, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with angled steel posts and an aluminum frame
attribute_array_configuration: single large rectangular grid, approximately 4x8 panels
